allow: Bash(then echo "✓ $name" else echo "✗ $name" fi done)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./db.json''\); const u=d.users||[]; const bad=u.filter\(x=>!x.username\); if\(bad.length\){console.error\(''FAIL: users missing username:'',bad.map\(x=>x.id\)\);process.exit\(1\)} else {console.log\(''OK: all'',u.length,''users have username''\)}")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./db.json''\); for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(d\)\){if\(!Array.isArray\(v\)\)continue; const nested=v.filter\(x=>Array.isArray\(x\)\); if\(nested.length\){console.error\(''FAIL:'',k,''has nested arrays''\);process.exit\(1\)}}; console.log\(''OK: no nested arrays in db.json''\)")

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|git push --force|git push -f|git reset --hard|docker rm |docker rmi )'; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Dangerous command blocked: $cmd\"}"; exit 1; fi; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '.github/workflows/' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"WARNING: You are editing a CI workflow file. This project has 10 GitHub Actions workflows. Verify your changes will not break CI."}}'; } || true

REPO=/Users/michaelzhou/Documents/github/michael-zhou-qa-portfolio; jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then "$REPO/venv/bin/black" --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; "$REPO/venv/bin/ruff" check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx)$'; then d="$f"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); if [ -x "$d/node_modules/.bin/prettier" ]; then "$d/node_modules/.bin/prettier" --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; break; fi; done; fi; } || true

cd /Users/michaelzhou/Documents/github/michael-zhou-qa-portfolio; changed=$({ git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null; } | sort -u); [ -z "$changed" ] && exit 0; suggestions=""; echo "$changed" | grep -q '\.py$' && suggestions="pytest"; echo "$changed" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx)$' && { [ -n "$suggestions" ] && suggestions="$suggestions, npm test" || suggestions="npm test"; }; echo "$changed" | grep -q '.github/workflows/' && { [ -n "$suggestions" ] && suggestions="$suggestions, check GitHub Actions" || suggestions="check GitHub Actions"; }; [ -n "$suggestions" ] && echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Test suggestion: $suggestions\"}" || true
